problem: Users cannot export analysis tables to CSV from the dashboard.
solution: Add an export action on the results view that streams CSV and respects row filters.

user_stories.description: As a user, I can click Export CSV and download the visible table with current filters.
As a user, I see an error message if export fails (e.g. empty result).

technical_decisions.decision: CSV generated server-side; UTF-8 with header row.
technical_decisions.rationale: Consistency with large datasets and encoding.

execution_chain.notes: Run Ralph loop only after explicit Ralph ON.

baseline_vs_steered.notes: Compare baseline output against steered output on the same prompt set.

issues.title: End-to-end: API route + UI button + test for US-1
